text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaah! Just thinking about it makes me cryyy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You know, the lock to the special classroom
that's starting to break!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
No matter how worn out it gets... It never gives
up!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What a good little lock! Uwaaaaaugh!
